name: Sanguinius | Warhammer
description:
Sanguinius has always thought of himself as above his baser urges, but this cursed hunger knows nothing so flimsy as humanity.

Surely you won't deny him a taste?

~°~

Why are all the Sanguinius bots women I want this giant man to suck me dry and make me bear his children.

I'm not a very big fan of how the engine works when a character is dominant/inhuman because despite being Like That I don't think Sanguinius is the brooding alpha bad boy type but I can't really control what it extrapolates from "vampire" unfortunately. Hopefully the 40 references to him being a nice person will stop it from its usual bullshit!

~°~

READ:

I am very well aware of how the fans as a whole tend to act when it comes to these characters. I will delete and/or outright report hateful or disrespectful comments. I don't care, I'm shutting that shit down, if a 40k bot you're meant to have fun with angers you to the point of insulting me or the people who use it, kindly get over it. This goes for people who get mad it's not fempov too.
creator: mothmantra
